title: Disclosure Day Trailer: Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor Fight Mysterious Threat To World In Steven Spielberg's 'UFO' Film - WATCH
description: Steven Spielberg's upcoming Disclosure Day is already being called the summer sci-fi blockbuster. The movie starring Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, Colin Firth, and others, takes the filmmaker back to the alien genre, which blends political thriller with mystery drama.

title: UFO Disclosure survival guide can save human race from catastrophe
description: Ufologist and filmmaker Mark Christopher Lee has created a survival guide so the human race can cope with UFO disclosure.

title: Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day Trailer Previews UFO Movie Starring Emily Blunt

title: Nick Pope - Britain's top UFO expert, known as the 'real Fox Mulder' - reveals devastating diagnosis
description: UFO expert Nick Pope - who worked for the British Ministry of Defence (MoD) between 1991 and 1994 - has revealed he has been diagnosed with incurable cancer.
